candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is explicitly the D&A component within the selected parent COGS bucket 'Cost of Sales' / 'Cost of Revenues - Total', so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This D&A row belongs to SG&A, not COGS, so it is not relevant to the COGS bucket.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This D&A row belongs to R&D, not COGS, so it is not relevant to the COGS bucket.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of Sales'. The visible D&A in cost of revenues is presented as a component beneath that total, so it appears already embedded and should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is explicitly a component within the selected parent row 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses', so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is explicitly a component within the selected parent row 'Research and development costs'. Since that R&D row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, the R&D D&A should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This D&A row belongs to COGS/cost of revenues, not SG&A/XSGA.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS reference bucket is the sum of 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' and 'Research and development costs'. Both visible D&A rows for SG&A and R&D appear as components under those selected parent rows, so they are already embedded. Additionally, the separate above-operating-profit R&D row is already included in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so R&D D&A should not be added separately.
